# Pinellas {.unnumbered}

```{r}
#| include: false
library(leaflet)
library(here)
library(sf)

i_am("docs/oppmap_pinellas.qmd")

source(here("R", "funcs.R"))

load(file = here('data', '01_inputs', 'tbcmp_cnt.RData'))
load(file = here('data', '04_opportunities_maps', 'oppmap_pinellas.RData'))
```

```{r}
#| fig-height: 8
oppmap_leaflet(oppmap_pinellas, 'Pinellas', tbcmp_cnt, simplify = 10)
```
Note: polygons have been simplified for web display.
